description_long: This guard rail consists of a sturdy metal frame with a slanted top rail and two vertical posts at each end, connected by horizontal and vertical bars for reinforcement. The design is open, with rectangular gaps between the bars, providing both visibility and safety. The metal appears to have a smooth, slightly matte finish, likely powder-coated or painted for weather resistance. The ends of the rail are blunt and squared off, with no visible flaring or additional end treatments. The structure is robust and utilitarian, suitable for installation along stairs, ramps, or elevated walkways in urban environments. There are no visible reflective markings or decorative elements, emphasizing its functional purpose.
description: A robust metal guard rail with a slanted top rail, rectangular open sections, and squared ends, finished in a smooth, matte metallic color.
description_view_0: Angled view showing the slanted top rail, rectangular open sections, and both vertical posts.
description_view_1: Side profile view, revealing the thin, linear profile of the rail and posts.
description_view_2: Opposite angled view, similar to view 0, showing the same structural features from the other side.
description_view_3: Top-down view, highlighting the narrow width and straight alignment of the rail.
